name: admin-service
description: Baalvion Identity Admin Microservice — super-admin operations, impersonation, platform stats

scripts.migrate: psql $DATABASE_URL -f migrations/001_feature_flags.sql && psql $DATABASE_URL -f migrations/002_analytics.sql && psql $DATABASE_URL -f migrations/003_support.sql && psql $DATABASE_URL -f migrations/004_developer.sql && psql $DATABASE_URL -f migrations/005_ai.sql && psql $DATABASE_URL -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -f migrations/006_rls_tenant_isolation.sql
